response.overview: Shankara Punyakoti (2009) is a Kannada family drama tracing the downfall of a naive priest, Shankaracharya, caused by his sister's scheming deeds. She abandons his newborn in a forest, claiming it was a deformed mass, only for the child to be raised by lower-caste individuals, leading to a dramatic exploration of family, status, and sacrifice
response.title: Shankara Punyakoti
